allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),p=require\('path'\);const d=p.join\(process.env.HOME,'.claude','projects','d--00-------------'\);const files=fs.readdirSync\(d\).filter\(f=>f.endsWith\('.jsonl'\)\).map\(f=>p.join\(d,f\)\);files.sort\(\(a,b\)=>fs.statSync\(b\).mtimeMs-fs.statSync\(a\).mtimeMs\);const c={};for\(const f of files.slice\(0,50\)\){const lines=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\);for\(const line of lines\){try{const o=JSON.parse\(line\);if\(o.role!=='assistant'\)continue;for\(const b of\(o.message?.content||[]\)\){if\(b.type==='tool_use'&&b.name==='Bash'\){const cmd=\(b.input?.command||''\).trim\(\);if\(!cmd\)continue;const parts=cmd.split\(/\\s+/\);let i=0;while\(i<parts.length&&parts[i].includes\('='\)\)i++;if\(i<parts.length\){const k=parts[i]+' '+\(parts[i+1]||''\);c[k]=\(c[k]||0\)+1;}}}}catch\(e\){}}}const s=Object.entries\(c\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\);for\(const[k,v]of s.slice\(0,30\)\)console.log\(v+' '+k\);")
